explanations.3: This points to a Docker Compose file in the parent directory that defines how the development environment should be set up.
explanations.4: The 'docs' service refers to a specific service defined in that Docker Compose file — it's the container this dev environment will run inside.
explanations.5: This is the folder path inside the Docker container where your project files will be mounted and available to edit.
explanations.16: The 'index_files/' folder is auto-generated output that you don't want cluttering your file explorer, so it's hidden.
explanations.19: When you save a Quarto file, VS Code will automatically run it to generate the output document.
